🍪 We use essential cookies to make our calculators work and optional analytics cookies to improve the site.

  1. Home
  2. Privacy Policy

Privacy Policy

Last updated: May 2026

TurfCalculator respects your privacy. This policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights.

Data We Collect

We collect no personal data. We do not require accounts, emails, names, or any personally identifiable information.

All calculator inputs and results are processed entirely in your browser. We never see, store, or transmit your calculations.

Analytics

We may use Google Analytics 4 to understand how visitors use our site. GA4 uses anonymized IP addresses and does not collect personally identifiable information.

Analytics are only activated after you provide consent via our cookie banner.

Cookies

Essential cookies: Language preference is stored in your browser's localStorage (not a cookie). This is necessary for site functionality.

Analytics cookies: Set by Google Analytics only after you consent. These include _ga and _gid cookies.

Advertising cookies: May be set by Google AdSense in the future, only after you consent.

Third-Party Services

Cloudflare: Our hosting and CDN provider. Cloudflare may collect technical data for security and performance.

Google Analytics: See the Analytics section above.

Google AdSense: May serve ads in the future. See the Cookies section above.

GDPR Compliance

Since we collect no personal data, most GDPR obligations do not apply to our core service.

You have the right to opt out of analytics and advertising cookies via our cookie consent banner.

For questions about your data, contact us at the email address below.

CCPA Compliance

We do not sell personal information. We do not share personal information with third parties beyond analytics and advertising services.

No personal information is collected by our core calculator services.

Contact

For privacy-related inquiries, please contact us through the information provided on our About page.

Privacy Terms Disclaimer Cookies

© 2026 TurfCalculator. Free lawn calculators for everyone.
